# Context Kernel v0.1.12

This release adds the first live MCP bridge operation: stdio tool discovery.

## Highlights

- Added `akernel mcp refresh <name>`.
- Starts a configured stdio MCP server and runs `initialize`.
- Calls `tools/list` and saves discovered tool names/descriptions into `.akernel/mcp.json`.
- Adds timeout handling and cleanup for MCP subprocesses.

## Note

This release discovers and stores tool summaries. Live agent-side MCP tool calls remain intentionally gated for the next bridge step.

## Validation

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
